svg.title: HelixTerminator — Kafka Message Flow
svg.desc: Draw.io architecture diagram. Open in diagrams.net or draw.io desktop for interactive view. File: 07_kafka_message_flow.drawio

metadata.drawio-source:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <mxfile host="diagrams.net" modified="2026-06-28T00:00:00.000Z" agent="HelixTerminator Spec" version="21.0.0" type="device"> <diagram name="Kafka Message Flow" id="kafka-flow-007"> <mxGraphModel dx="1600" dy="900" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="2200" pageHeight="1600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
<!-- Title --> <mxCell id="title" value="HelixTerminator — Kafka Message Flow Architecture" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="20" width="1400" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== KAFKA CLUSTER ===== --> <mxCell id="kafka-cluster" value="Apache Kafka Cluster (3 Brokers, Replication Factor=3)" style="swimlane;startSize=35;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="60" width="840" height="1420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kafka-note" value="Zookeeper Ensemble (3 nodes) | SASL/PLAIN Auth | TLS in-transit | Retention: 7 days" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="10" y="35" width="820" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topic: session.events --> <mxCell id="topic-session" value="Topic: session.events
Partitions: 12 | Retention: 30d" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=10;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="70" width="280" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topic: audit.events --> <mxCell id="topic-audit" value="Topic: audit.events
Partitions: 24 | Retention: 365d" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=10;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="200" width="280" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topic: user.events --> <mxCell id="topic-user" value="Topic: user.events
Partitions: 6 | Retention: 90d" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=10;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="330" width="280" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topic: host.events --> <mxCell id="topic-host" value="Topic: host.events
Partitions: 6 | Retention: 90d" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=10;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="460" width="280" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topic: vault.events --> <mxCell id="topic-vault" value="Topic: vault.events
Partitions: 6 | Retention: 90d" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=10;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="590" width="280" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topic: key.rotation --> <mxCell id="topic-keyrot" value="Topic: key.rotation
Partitions: 3 | Retention: 30d" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;size=10;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="720" width="280" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topic: notification.events --> <mxCell id="topic-notif" value="Topic: notification.events
Partitions: 6 | Retention: 7d" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=10;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="850" width="280" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topic: metrics.raw --> <mxCell id="topic-metrics" value="Topic: metrics.raw
Partitions: 12 | Retention: 3d" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;size=10;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="980" width="280" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topic: dlq (dead-letter) --> <mxCell id="topic-dlq" value="Topic: __deadletter__
Partitions: 6 | Retention: 14d" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#b85450;size=10;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="1110" width="280" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Partition labels inside kafka cluster --> <mxCell id="partition-note" value="Each partition key = org_id + user_id (deterministic routing)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="10" y="1230" width="820" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Schema Registry --> <mxCell id="schema-reg" value="Schema Registry
(Avro / Protobuf)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="600" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="schema-note" value="All messages schema-validated
on produce & consume" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="kafka-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="660" width="200" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== PRODUCERS ===== --> <mxCell id="producers-group" value="Producers (Publishing Services)" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="60" width="600" height="1420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- SSH Proxy producer --> <mxCell id="prod-sshproxy" value="SSH Proxy Service
(session.events)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="60" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod-session-events" value="SessionStarted | SessionEnded
CommandExecuted | Disconnected" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="65" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Auth service producer --> <mxCell id="prod-auth" value="Auth Service
(audit.events)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="190" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod-audit-events" value="LoginSuccess | LoginFailed | TokenIssued
MFAVerified | PermissionDenied" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="195" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- User service producer --> <mxCell id="prod-user" value="User Service
(user.events)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="320" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod-user-events" value="UserCreated | UserUpdated
RoleChanged | UserDeleted" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="325" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Host registry producer --> <mxCell id="prod-host" value="Host Registry Service
(host.events)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="450" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod-host-events" value="HostAdded | HostRemoved
HostStatusChanged | GroupUpdated" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="455" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Vault service producer --> <mxCell id="prod-vault" value="Vault Service
(vault.events)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="580" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod-vault-events" value="VaultItemCreated | VaultItemDeleted
VaultShared | VaultAccessRevoked" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="585" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Key rotation producer --> <mxCell id="prod-keyrot" value="Key Rotation Service
(key.rotation)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="710" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod-keyrot-events" value="KeyRotationStarted | KeyRotationComplete
KeyCompromised | HSMHealthCheck" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="715" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Session manager producer --> <mxCell id="prod-sessmgr" value="Session Manager
(notification.events)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="840" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod-notif-events" value="AlertConnected | AlertDisconnected
ThreatDetected | PolicyViolation" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="845" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Metrics collector producer --> <mxCell id="prod-metrics" value="All Services
(metrics.raw)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="970" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prod-metrics-events" value="CPU | Memory | Latency | RPM
ErrorRate | ConnectionCount" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fffde7;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="producers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="975" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== CONSUMER GROUPS ===== --> <mxCell id="consumers-group" value="Consumer Groups & Processing Services" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1560" y="60" width="600" height="1420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Audit service consumer --> <mxCell id="cons-audit" value="Audit Log Service
Group: audit-writers" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="60" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons-audit-note" value="Consumes: session.events, audit.events
→ Writes to PostgreSQL + Elasticsearch" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f0fff0;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="65" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- SIEM consumer --> <mxCell id="cons-siem" value="SIEM Exporter
Group: siem-export" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="190" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons-siem-note" value="Consumes: audit.events
→ Streams to Splunk / Elastic SIEM" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f0fff0;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="195" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Notification consumer --> <mxCell id="cons-notif" value="Notification Service
Group: notification-sender" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="320" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons-notif-note" value="Consumes: notification.events, user.events
→ Email / Slack / PagerDuty / Push" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f0fff0;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="325" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Search indexer consumer --> <mxCell id="cons-search" value="Search Indexer
Group: search-indexer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="450" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons-search-note" value="Consumes: host.events, user.events
→ Updates Elasticsearch index" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f0fff0;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="455" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Key rotation consumer --> <mxCell id="cons-keyrot" value="Vault Re-encryption
Group: vault-reencrypt" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="580" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons-keyrot-note" value="Consumes: key.rotation
→ Re-encrypts affected vault items" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f0fff0;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="585" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Metrics consumer --> <mxCell id="cons-metrics" value="Metrics Aggregator
Group: metrics-agg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="710" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons-metrics-note" value="Consumes: metrics.raw
→ Writes to Prometheus remote-write" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f0fff0;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="715" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Alert consumer --> <mxCell id="cons-alert" value="Alert Engine
Group: alert-engine" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="840" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons-alert-note" value="Consumes: audit.events, session.events
→ Anomaly detection + policy checks" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f0fff0;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="845" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Recording consumer --> <mxCell id="cons-record" value="Session Recorder
Group: session-recorder" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="970" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons-record-note" value="Consumes: session.events
→ Assembles recording → uploads to S3" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f0fff0;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="975" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- DLQ consumer --> <mxCell id="cons-dlq" value="DLQ Handler
Group: dlq-reprocessor" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="1100" width="200" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cons-dlq-note" value="Consumes: __deadletter__
→ Alert + retry / discard after 3 attempts" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f0fff0;align=left;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="consumers-group"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="1105" width="340" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== PRODUCER → TOPIC ARROWS ===== --> <mxCell id="e-p-sess" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="168" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="260" y="168" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="680" y="168" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p-aud" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="298" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="260" y="298" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="680" y="298" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p-user" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="428" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="260" y="428" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="680" y="428" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p-host" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="558" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="260" y="558" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="680" y="558" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p-vault" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="688" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="260" y="688" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="680" y="688" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p-keyrot" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="818" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="260" y="818" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="680" y="818" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p-notif" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="948" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="260" y="948" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="680" y="948" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p-metrics" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="1078" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="260" y="1078" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="680" y="1078" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== TOPIC → CONSUMER ARROWS ===== --> <mxCell id="e-t-audit" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="168" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1520" y="168" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1560" y="168" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-t-siem" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="298" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1520" y="298" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1560" y="298" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-t-notif" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="428" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1520" y="428" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1560" y="428" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-t-search" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="558" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1520" y="558" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1560" y="558" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-t-keyrot" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="688" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1520" y="688" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1560" y="688" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-t-metagg" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="818" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1520" y="818" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1560" y="818" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-t-alert" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="948" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1520" y="948" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1560" y="948" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-t-recorder" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="1078" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1520" y="1078" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1560" y="1078" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-t-dlq" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1520" y="1208" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1520" y="1208" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1560" y="1208" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== RABBITMQ SIDE NOTE ===== --> <mxCell id="rabbitmq-note" value="RabbitMQ (Task Queues)

Queues:
• email.notifications (fanout)
• sms.notifications (direct)
• push.notifications (topic)
• webhook.delivery (direct)
• key.rotation.tasks (work queue)

Used for: guaranteed-delivery tasks
where exactly-once semantics matter." style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=20;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;align=left;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="1300" width="300" height="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== KAFKA GUARANTEE NOTE ===== --> <mxCell id="kafka-guarantee" value="Kafka Guarantees:
• At-least-once delivery (default)
• Idempotent producers (enable.idempotence=true)
• Transactional producers for multi-topic writes
• Consumer offset commit: manual (post-processing)
• Backpressure: consumer lag monitoring via Grafana
• Replay: any consumer can reset offsets for replay" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=20;fillColor=#fffde7;strokeColor=#d6b656;align=left;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1600" y="1280" width="400" height="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
</root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
